issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'Activated' — card triggers when attacking, not when manually activated
Condition should check for DON!! cost (HasAttachedDon with count 1) not resting DON, and should verify you have a resting Character with cost ≥3 to rest
Missing the primary action: Set this Character as active. Current DSL only rests a target character but doesn't set attacking character active
maxCost should be ≥3 (cost of 3 or more), not maxCost:3 which typically means exactly 3
